name: 27-invalid-cdx-url-mismatch
description: CDX externalReferences[].url is `wrong-name.aibom.json` but the distributed sidecar filename is `fixture-27.aibom.json`. The hash in externalReferences is correct for the actual sidecar bytes — the defect is purely the url-to-filename binding.
notes: Even with a correct hash, a url that does not resolve to the distributed sidecar means a generic CDX verifier cannot fetch-and-hash-verify. schema-rule requires the externalReferences entry to point at the actual distributed sidecar. This is a co-location check, complementary to the hash-match check in fixture 17 — fixture 17 has matching filename but wrong hash; fixture 27 has matching hash but wrong filename.
